images.depicts: FILE MISSING FROM FOLDER (book spread 1 has no image)
images.issue: Spec asset + book spread 1 requires duck.png but it does not exist in the Week 25 images folder. Also referenced as fallback for word-song intro line. Must be generated/added.

images.depicts: real white duck, beak wide open mid-quack, close-up
real tabby cat hissing/snarling with bared fangs and a raised paw, aggressive pose
images.issue: Does not show the cat 'attempting to quack' in a comedic, unconvinced duck-beak-mouth-shape way per the artNote. It reads as an angry/hissing cat, not a quacking gag.

images.depicts: real shaggy dog, mouth wide open, head thrown back
images.issue: Reads slightly more like panting/howling than a joyful committed quack attempt, but close enough to the artNote (head thrown back, mouth open, enthusiastic) to pass.

images.depicts: real grey rat rearing up on hind legs, front paws raised, mouth closed
images.issue: Mouth is not open/vocalizing — reads as a startled/reaching pose, not 'tiny high-pitched double quacks.'

images.depicts: wooden peg-doll boy in red sweater, hands cupped to mouth, quacking, closed happy eyes
cat, dog, rat, fox, two small peg dolls, and duck (mid-quack) all together, chaotic group scene
images.issue: Duck is not visibly 'conducting like a bandleader' as the artNote asks — it's just another quacking member — but the overall 'whole cast chorus' content matches well.

images.depicts: real red fox, mouth wide open looking upward, howling/yawning-like expression
images.issue: Does not match 'sly-quacking out the side of its mouth, one eyebrow up, not really trying' — this fox is wide-open-mouthed and skyward, not a sly side-mouth smirk.

images.depicts: cartoon/CG-rendered potato with googly eyes and a 'QUACK' comic speech bubble
images.issue: Style break: rendered as a cartoon illustration (googly eyes, comic bubble) instead of the ultra-realistic photograph style used everywhere else in the series, and does not match the established photorealistic 'teacher potato' (glasses, whiteboard) character reused from Week 1.

leather quiver full of feathered arrows
smiling quokka close-up, paws raised, happy expression
stack of quiz papers with question marks, gold pencil resting on top
large glossy red 3D question mark on a dark spotlit surface
FILE MISSING FROM FOLDER (spec says 'REUSED FROM WEEK 1' for bingo pool, and is the correct non-quacking potato needed for the sound song's 'Not Qu!' bridge line)
images.issue: Not present in Week 25 images folder. Needs to be copied over from Week 1 or regenerated so the sound song bridge line has a plain (non-quacking) potato to contrast against potato-quack.png.

line_map.line: [Intro] kw… kw… kw… (two sounds, one quick glide)
[Hook 1] Qu! Qu! Kw-kw-kw! What begins with Qu?
Qu-qu-queen! Qu-qu-queen! It's a queen! (a queen!)
[Hook 2] Qu! Qu! Kw-kw-kw! What begins with Qu?
Qu-qu-quilt! Qu-qu-quilt! It's a quilt! (a quilt!)
[Hook 3] Qu! Qu! Kw-kw-kw! What begins with Qu?
Qu-qu-quill! Qu-qu-quill! It's a quill! (a quill!)
[Breakdown] kw… kw… (q brings u everywhere it goes)

line_map.note: No image conveys 'quick' anywhere in the set.
Needs a PLAIN, non-quacking potato — the only potato asset in this folder (potato-quack.png) shows it quacking, which contradicts 'Not Qu!'
Same as above — reuse Week 1's potato.png (teacher potato, glasses) if available, else generate fresh.

line_map.line: The duck says quack, quack, quack!

generate.line: quack… quick… quiz… (qu starts them all!)
generate.mj_prompt: a golden lightning bolt frozen mid-motion streaking through the frame, sense of speed, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

line_map.note: duck.png (plain duck) is missing from the folder; duck-quack.png used as best available substitute.

line_map.line: What does the duck say? (quack! quack!)

line_map.note: Existing file shows a hissing/aggressive cat, not a comedic quack attempt — see wrong_art.
Existing file shows the fox howling upward, not a sly side-mouth quack — see wrong_art.
'Quick, quick!' itself has no strong visual; 'Everyone!' is covered by the next line's image.
No dedicated Segina-quacking image exists anywhere in the set — quack-chorus.png shows two small blurred peg dolls in the background but neither is a clear, identifiable Segina-quack shot.
No image shows the duck in a stern/scolding 'quit it' pose — duck-quack.png only shows an open-beak quack, not a rebuke.
Content (potato + QUACK) is thematically correct for this line, but the art style is a cartoon/CG break from the series — see wrong_art.

wrong_art.issue: Shows a hissing/snarling cat with bared fangs and a raised claw — reads as aggressive, not a comedic 'attempting to quack, ridiculous duck-beak-shaped mouth, unconvinced' gag.
wrong_art.fix: Regenerate with a comedic, mouth-pursed-into-a-round-duck-beak-shape pose, uncertain expression, no aggression.
wrong_art.mj_prompt: a tabby cat pursing its mouth into a comically round duck-beak shape trying to quack, eyes uncertain and unconvinced, comedic, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: Fox is shown wide-mouthed and howling upward, not the artNote's 'sly-quacking out the side of its mouth, one eyebrow up, not really trying.'
wrong_art.fix: Regenerate with a closed-ish, side-of-mouth smirk and a raised eyebrow instead of a full howl.
wrong_art.mj_prompt: a red fox quacking out of one side of its mostly closed mouth with a sly smirk, one eyebrow raised, barely trying, unconvinced, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: Rendered as a cartoon/CG illustration with googly eyes and a comic speech bubble — breaks the ultra-realistic-photograph style used across the rest of the series and does not match the photorealistic 'teacher potato' (glasses, whiteboard) established in Week 1.
wrong_art.fix: Regenerate in the matching photographic style, keeping the QUACK gag but as a realistic prop/photo composition.
wrong_art.mj_prompt: a single raw potato under a dramatic spotlight with a small realistic paper speech-bubble prop reading QUACK propped beside it, ultra-realistic photograph, deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: Rat's mouth is closed — it reads as a startled/reaching pose rather than 'tiny high-pitched double quacks.' (Referenced by book spread 5, not directly quoted in either song's lyrics.)
wrong_art.fix: Regenerate with the rat's mouth open mid-squeak.
wrong_art.mj_prompt: a small grey rat on tiptoe with mouth wide open mid-squeak-quack, front paws raised, giving it everything, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw
